publicationStmt.p: Encoded for the TR Digital Library, public domain.

sourceDesc.bibl: Address before the Hamilton Club, Chicago, 10 April 1899.

div.head: Opening
div.p: In speaking to you, men of the greatest city of the West, I wish to preach the doctrine of the strenuous life.

lg.l: Above all, let us shrink from no strife,
Moral or physical, within or without the nation,
Provided we are certain that the strife is justified.
